word: H2769 - חֶרְמֹונִים - Chermôwnîym - kher-mo-neem' - The Hermonites

sections.paragraph:
Original: חרמונים

Transliteration: chermônı̂ym

Phonetic: kher-mo-neem'

BDB Definition:

Hermonites = see Hermon " a sanctuary"
  1. the name for the three summits of Mount Hermon located on the border of Palestine and Lebanon

Origin: pl. of H2768

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
